name: The Bantha Rush
risk: If you fail the Control roll, you stumble and overextend yourself, presenting an Opening that allows an enemy to immediately spend a Trigger to react.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Body Check
effect.description: You slam into the target but fail to fully displace them. They gain [Exposed to Melee Attacks] against your next attack.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Driving Tackle
effect.description: You drive the target 1 Zone away. You may choose to hold your ground or follow them into that Zone.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: The Slam
effect.description: You drive the target 1 Zone away, follow them in, and bring them to the ground. The target gains [Prone]. Your next Brawl or Light Melee chassis action this turn is [Optimized].

gambits.name: Breakneck Pace
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You channel your momentum into a burst of speed. Move an additional 1 Zone after resolving.

gambits.name: Earth-Shaker
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You drive the target into a wall, pillar, or hard surface in the Zone. Requires one such surface to exist — if none is present, this gambit cannot be declared. The collision creates an Opening any ally may spend immediately.

name: The Clinch
risk: If you fail the Control roll, you leave your guard wide open, presenting an Opening that allows an enemy to immediately spend a Trigger to react.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: The Jam
effect.description: You crowd their space and throw off their rhythm. The target is [Distracted].

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: The Clinch
effect.description: You step inside their guard and lock a limb. The target is [Pinned]. Breaking free costs their Maneuver.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Dominate
effect.description: You take them fully to the ground. The target gains [Pinned] and [Exposed to Melee Attacks]. Your Brawl attacks against them Step Up the Power Die while the hold is maintained.

gambits.name: Meat Shield
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You grab the target and crowd them into the line of fire. You gain the target as [Cover 1] against Ranged attacks.

gambits.name: Nerve Strike
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You torque a joint or find a nerve cluster in the hold. The target gains [Weakened (Physique)] — their striking arm is compromised for as long as the hold is maintained.

name: The Brace
risk: If you fail the Control roll, you present an Opening that allows an enemy to immediately spend a Trigger to react.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Steady
effect.description: You flinch but hold your ground. Gain [Guarded 1] against the next incoming attack this round.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Shake it Off
effect.description: You lock your stance and push through the pain. Gain [Guarded 1] against all incoming attacks. Clear one physical condition ([Dazed], [Weakened], or [Prone]).

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Unbreakable
effect.description: You are beyond pain. Gain [Guarded 1] against all incoming attacks. Clear one physical condition. One ally in your Zone gains your [Guarded 1] benefit as well.

gambits.name: Gut Check
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You dig deep and clear one physical condition ([Dazed], [Weakened], or [Prone]) immediately. If the base result (Basic or Superior) also clears a condition, you clear two total.

gambits.name: Vanguard
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You step into the line of fire. You grant the [Guarded] benefit of this Brace to an ally in your Zone instead of yourself. You gain no guard benefit.

name: Footwork & Guard
risk: If you fail the Control roll, you lose your balance and present an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: The Feint
effect.description: You fake a strike to draw their guard. The target is [Exposed to Melee Attacks] against your next Melee action this turn.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: The Parry
effect.description: You read their swing and redirect it. Gain [Guarded 1] against Melee attacks. If an enemy's Melee attack fails to clear your Defense, you may spend your Trigger to make a free Basic Melee action against them.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Master's Flourish
effect.description: You dominate the exchange entirely. Gain [Guarded 1] against Melee attacks. The target gains [Exposed to Melee Attacks]. While your Guarded is active, each enemy Melee attack that fails to clear your Defense creates an Opening any ally in melee range may immediately spend.

gambits.name: Precision Strike
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You find a gap in their plating. Step Up the Control Die on your next Melee Action this turn.

gambits.name: The Disarm
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You catch their weapon and twist; the target immediately drops whatever they are holding in their primary hand.

name: Suppression
risk: If you fail the Control roll, the weapon's recoil or weight causes you to stumble, presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Bracket
effect.description: You lay a warning burst on one target within range. That target gains [Distracted].

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Suppressive Fire
effect.description: You sweep the area. Every enemy in a target Zone within the weapon's range gains [Distracted]. Designate a Zone of Denial — spend your Trigger to make a Basic Heavy Weapons attack against any enemy that enters or exits that Zone.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Pin Them Down
effect.description: The weight of fire is overwhelming. Every enemy in the target Zone gains [Suppressed]. You gain [Guarded 1] against Ranged attacks originating from that Zone.

gambits.name: Overcharge
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You push the weapon past its rated output. Gain [Empowered] on your next Heavy Weapons Action.

gambits.name: Bunker
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You plant yourself completely. Gain [Guarded 2] against all Ranged attacks. This ends the moment you move or take a non-Heavy Weapons action.

name: The Weave
risk: If you fail the Control roll, you stumble or hesitate, presenting an Opening that allows an enemy to immediately spend a Trigger to react.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: The Step
effect.description: You read the flow of the fight and shift your weight. Gain [Optimized] on your next Defense roll.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Slip Away
effect.description: You flow out of the danger zone. Move 1 Zone ignoring [Engaged] — this movement triggers no Opening from enemies you leave. Gain [Optimized] on your next Defense roll.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: The Blur
effect.description: You seem to vanish from your position. Move up to 2 Zones ignoring [Engaged] — no Opening triggered from any Zone you pass through or leave. Gain [Optimized] on all Defense rolls until your next turn.

gambits.name: Kinetic Dodge
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Your evasive momentum carries directly into your next move. Gain [Optimized] on your next Reflex-based Action this turn — not just Defense, but any Reflex roll.

gambits.name: Recovery
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Requires: you are currently [Pinned] or [Restrained]. Your expertise means you did not panic — you used technique. Immediately clear that condition and move 1 Zone.

name: Overwatch
risk: If you fail the Control roll, you lose your focus or your weapon jams momentarily, presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Aim
effect.description: You settle your sights. Step Up the Control Die on your next Ranged Action this turn.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Choose one — Covering Fire or Dial In
effect.description: Covering Fire: One target in range gains [Distracted] — you bracket them with bolts without a direct hit. | Dial In: Ignore concealment-based penalties (smoke, darkness, weather) on your next Ranged attack. Cover is structural and is not affected by this.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Zone of Denial
effect.description: Designate a Zone within your weapon's range. Until your next turn, spend your Trigger to make a Basic Ranged attack against any enemy that enters or exits that Zone. You gain [Optimized] on that Trigger attack.

gambits.name: Trick Shot
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You shoot an environmental element (a door release, a light fixture, a cable, a fuel line) to trigger a scene effect without using your Primary Action.

gambits.name: Dead Eye
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Your next Ranged attack ignores the target's [Cover] rating entirely — you find the gap in their position.

name: The Dirty Trick
risk: If you fail the Control roll, your trick is spotted, presenting an Opening that allows an enemy to immediately spend a Trigger to react.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Pocket Sand
effect.description: You kick dirt, sparks, or debris into their face. The target is [Distracted]. You may draw a concealed weapon or palm a small item as part of this Maneuver.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Foul Play
effect.description: You mess with their gear — jam a holster, unclip a pack, loosen a strap. The target gains [Exposed to Attacks]. You may deploy or pocket a small item (stim, detonator, slicing spike) as part of this Maneuver.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Sabotage
effect.description: You disable a primary component — weapon, comm, or gear. It cannot be used until the target spends an Action to fix it. The target is also [Exposed to Attacks].

gambits.name: Below the Belt
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You strike a nerve or wind them. The target cannot use their Maneuver Action on their next turn.

gambits.name: Rigged
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You prime a charge, grenade, or detonator and attach it to a surface or an enemy without needing to spend your Primary Action.

name: The Drift
risk: If you fail the Control roll, you lose your vector or clip an obstacle, presenting an Opening that allows an enemy to immediately spend a Trigger to react.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Juke
effect.description: You sharply adjust your vector. Gain [Cover 1] against the next vehicle-scale attack.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Gain Angle
effect.description: You get behind them. Gain [Optimized] on your next Gunnery or Ranged Action. Force a pursuing vehicle to Step Down their Control Die.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Master Pilot
effect.description: Perfect execution. Gain [Optimized] and [Guarded 1]. A pursuing vehicle Steps Down their Control Die.

gambits.name: Thread the Needle
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You force your vehicle through a lethal gap. A pursuing vehicle must successfully pass a Risk Check or crash.

gambits.name: Redline
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You move an extra 2 Zones, but the vehicle suffers 1 System Strain.

name: Predatory Positioning
risk: If you fail the Control roll, you mistime your move and end up caught in the open, presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Low Profile
effect.description: You make yourself small and quiet. Gain [Cover 1].

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Shadow Step
effect.description: Move 1 Zone — this does not trigger Openings and is not registered by watching enemies. Gain [Optimized] on your next attack.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: The Fade
effect.description: Move 1 Zone. Enemies lose your position entirely. Gain [Cover 1] and [Optimized] on your next attack against a target.

gambits.name: Misdirection
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You toss a decoy (a shell casing, a rock). An enemy looks the wrong way, gaining the [Exposed] condition.

gambits.name: Vanishing Act
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. After performing a Primary Action (like a shot), you immediately fade into the chaos, gaining the [Cover 1] condition.

name: The Anchor
risk: You over-focus internally and lose track of the immediate threat, presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Focus
effect.description: You push through the noise. Ignore the [Distracted] condition for your next action this turn.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Center
effect.description: You find your footing. Clear one Lingering mental or emotional condition ([Dazed] or [Distracted]).

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Battle Hardened
effect.description: You are a void of emotion. Gain [Guarded 1] against all Mental or Ego-based attacks AND ignore the penalties of one Trauma for your next action.

gambits.name: Cognitive Surge
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You achieve total clarity. Step Up the Control Die on your next action this turn, regardless of the attribute used.

gambits.name: The Standoff
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You lock eyes with a single enemy you are Engaged with. As long as you remain Engaged, neither of you can break Engagement safely. If either you or the target intentionally attempts to leave the Zone or break Engagement, that individual immediately presents an Opening and the opponent is considered [Optimized] for the resulting Trigger Action. Only one enemy may be Challenged at a time.

name: The Hunker
risk: You choose trap cover (exploding barrels, unstable debris), presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Spot the Gap
effect.description: You find a quick angle. Gain [Cover 1] against the very next Ranged attack this round.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Dig In
effect.description: You find a solid position. Gain [Cover 1].

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Kill Zone
effect.description: You find the perfect vantage point. Gain [Cover 2] AND Step Up the Power Die on your next Ranged Action from this position.

gambits.name: Scrounge
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You find a useful environmental tool — a rock, a loose wire, a stim. Gain [Optimized] on your next Skulduggery or Medicine action.

gambits.name: Weather the Storm
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You lead the squad into safety. Grant your current [Cover] rating to all allies in your Zone.

name: The Loom
risk: Your bluff is called or your threat is laughed off, presenting an Opening that allows an enemy to immediately spend a Trigger to react.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Flinch
effect.description: You draw their focus. The target is [Distracted].

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Loom
effect.description: You crowd their space and make them doubt. The target is [Exposed].

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Rattled
effect.description: You shake them to the core. The target is [Distracted] AND [Exposed].

gambits.name: Tell Me
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Fear makes them talk. Gain [Optimized] on your next Insight or Deception action against this target.

gambits.name: Cold Blooded
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You perform a deliberate show of indifference — shooting a console, crushing a glass, ignoring a wound. One Minion-level enemy in the Zone must pass a Risk 4 Resolve check or immediately flee the scene.

gambits.name: The Ultimatum
gambits.rule: Requires a carried Thermal Detonator. Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Arm it — dead-man's switch engaged. All characters within 5 squares who can see and hear you are affected. This gambit may only be used once per scene. While holding: you are [Optimized] and [Empowered] on all Intimidate (Grit) actions and maneuvers against any onlooker. If incapacitated, struck critically, or the switch is released, it detonates in your zone immediately.

name: Dominion
risk: The beast senses weakness and snaps at you, presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Pacify
effect.description: You break the beast's focus. It gains [Distracted].

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Assert
effect.description: You read its movements and brace. Gain [Guarded 1] against the beast.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Overpower the Instinct
effect.description: You dominate its psyche. The beast gains [Exposed] to all attacks.

gambits.name: Redirect
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You turn the beast's aggression. It immediately moves toward and Engages a target of your choice in the Zone instead of you.

gambits.name: Break
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You shatter the beast's fighting instinct entirely. It gains [Stunned].

name: Control Pain
risk: Reaching inward costs your outward awareness — you present an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Suppress
effect.description: You push the pain aside. Ignore the mechanical penalty of one active Perceptual condition ([Distracted], [Dazed], [Stunned], or [Weakened]) for your next action. Positional and Environmental conditions cannot be suppressed — you cannot will yourself off the ground.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Control Pain
effect.description: You seal off all pain signals through the Force. Ignore ALL active Perceptual condition penalties AND the penalties of 1 Trauma for this round. Positional conditions ([Prone], [Restrained], [Pinned], [Blinded], [Slowed]) and Environmental damage ([Hazard], [Bleeding]) are physical realities — they remain.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Body Over Mind
effect.description: You enter a sustained state of deep pain suppression. Ignore all Perceptual condition penalties and all Trauma penalties until your next turn AND gain [Buffered 1] as the Force stabilizes your body against further shock.

gambits.name: Remain Conscious
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. If you would be incapacitated this round, you may spend your Trigger to remain conscious and functional until the end of the scene — though you are still at 0 Vitality and further damage ends this effect immediately.

gambits.name: Reduce Injury
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You channel the Force through your injury. Convert 1 Vitality damage already suffered this scene into a Trauma instead — the wound is real, but the body responds.

name: The Read
risk: You over-analyze and miss a real-world strike, presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Scan the Scene
effect.description: Your eye lands on something useful. The GM reveals one tactical detail in your Zone or an adjacent Zone — a hazard, cover value, structural weakness, or hidden route. Gain [Optimized] on your next action that uses this information.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Spot the Flaw
effect.description: You deduce a physical vulnerability. The target is [Exposed to your next attack]. Alternatively, you identify an environmental hazard that can be triggered against them — the GM adjudicates the effect.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Shatter the Pattern
effect.description: Your deduction reaches its conclusion. The target is [Exposed] and [Distracted]. You may immediately trigger one environmental element in your Zone as a free action — a collapsing ledge, sparking conduit, loose cable — GM adjudicates narrative permission and effect.

gambits.name: Predictive Reflex
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You know where they are going to strike. Gain [Optimized] on all Defense rolls against the target until your next turn.

gambits.name: Tactical Reveal
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You've mapped the full tactical geometry. Every enemy in the Zone gains [Exposed].

name: Combat Triage
risk: You fumble the stim or the patch, causing minor pain and presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Stabilize
effect.description: You slap on a bacta-patch. Immediately remove the [Bleeding] condition from yourself or an ally in your Zone.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Combat Stim
effect.description: You spike the system. Clear [Dazed] or [Distracted] from yourself or an ally in your Zone, OR grant them [Buffered 1].

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Full Intervention
effect.description: You push through the damage. Target ignores the penalties of 1 Trauma for their next action AND gains [Buffered 1].

gambits.name: Shared Stim
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Apply this maneuver's effect to yourself AND one ally in your Zone simultaneously.

gambits.name: Neural Override
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Clear ALL Lingering conditions from the target instead of the normal effect.

name: Spiritual Intuition
risk: Reaching deep into the Force dims your physical awareness — you present an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Danger Warning
effect.description: The Force whispers of immediate threat before your body can react. Step Up your next Defense Control Die.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Beyond Sight
effect.description: You perceive through the Force rather than your eyes. Detect all living beings in your Zone and all adjacent Zones regardless of darkness, smoke, or concealment. Ignore [Stealth] for your next action.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Battle Foresight
effect.description: You read the flow of events moments before they unfold. You cannot present an Opening this round and you gain one additional Trigger to spend before your next turn.

gambits.name: Read the Heart
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You sense the emotional truth of one target in sight. The GM reveals one hidden intention, lie, or secret motivation of that target.

gambits.name: Ripple in the Force
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You feel a significant disturbance. The GM reveals the presence, location, and emotional state of all sentient beings within 2 Zones, including those hidden by Stealth or barriers.

name: Battle Command
risk: Your command is misread or arrives too late, presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Heads Up!
effect.description: One ally in your Zone or an adjacent Zone ignores the next Opening they present this round.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Focus Fire!
effect.description: One ally in your Zone or an adjacent Zone gains [Optimized] for their next attack.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Hold the Line! / Suppress!
effect.description: Choose one: One ally gains [Guarded 1], OR one enemy in sight gains [Suppressed].

gambits.name: Coordinated Strike
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Two allies each gain [Optimized] on their next action.

gambits.name: Execute Order
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. One ally may immediately perform a free Maneuver of their choice.

name: Combat Engineering
risk: You expose yourself manipulating the device or spark a short circuit in your own gear, presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Jam Comms
effect.description: You physically disrupt or disable a target's comms equipment. Their electronic communications are [Disabled] (Ongoing — cleared by a successful Tech action or end of scene). The target is [Distracted].

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Sabotage Gear
effect.description: You physically disable a weapon trait (Auto, Blast, Stun Setting, etc.) or piece of equipment on the target. The affected gear is non-functional until repaired or cleared by a Tech action.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Catastrophic Failure
effect.description: You trigger a cascading systems overload. Droids are [Shut Down] for 1 round. Targets dependent on powered systems (HUD, targeting arrays, powered armor) are [Blinded] and [Distracted].

gambits.name: Jury Rig
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You cannibalize nearby components. Gain [Buffered 1] or Step Up a damaged piece of your own gear for your next action.

gambits.name: Override
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You seize temporary control of one droid or automated system in your Zone. It takes one directed action before reverting to its original programming. GM adjudicates based on droid type and complexity.

name: Bravado
risk: You come across as false, desperate, or trying too hard. The NPC closes off — the GM may raise their Social Resistance by 1 for the rest of the scene.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Warm Opening
effect.description: You find common ground or land a genuine compliment. The NPC's initial defensiveness drops. Your next Charm or Persuasion roll against them is [Optimized].

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Lower the Guard
effect.description: Your ease puts them at ease. The NPC willingly answers one honest question or removes one specific social barrier — suspicion, reluctance, or formality.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Win the Room
effect.description: Your presence is magnetic. All NPCs present soften their stance — treat this group's Social Resistance as reduced by 1 for the rest of the scene.

gambits.name: Smooth It Over
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. If you or an ally failed a social roll against this target earlier this scene, that failure is completely supplanted — the target's attitude resets to neutral before applying this Maneuver's result.

gambits.name: Unforgettable
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You leave a lasting impression. In any future scene where this NPC is present, you begin with their goodwill already established — they treat you as a trusted acquaintance regardless of circumstances.

name: The False Gap
risk: Your feint is spotted, presenting an Opening that allows an enemy to immediately spend a Trigger to react.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: The Tell
effect.description: You read their reaction to the feint. Gain [Optimized] on your next Melee Attack or Deception roll this turn. Combat: you caught their flinch. Narrative: the seed is planted and you know exactly how to press.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: False Threat
effect.description: The target takes the bait. They gain [Distracted]. Combat: they flinched at the fake threat and lost their focus. Narrative: they are chasing a false lead.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: The Setup
effect.description: You bait them perfectly. The target immediately spends a Trigger to make an attack — but that attack is redirected to a target in the same Zone: an ally, an enemy, or an environmental hazard. The redirected attack is resolved normally. The GM has final say on the redirection target and any special effects when striking a hazard. Combat: a vibro-sword guided into an electrical conduit, a blaster bolt walked into a friendly. Narrative: a provoked outburst directed at the wrong person, a critical slip in negotiations.

gambits.name: Smoke and Mirrors
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. The misdirection extends to your own position. An enemy targeting you this turn must instead target another valid target in the Zone.

gambits.name: Chaos Cascade
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. The confusion propagates outward. All enemies in the Zone gain [Distracted] as they respond to conflicting information.

name: The Eye
risk: You misread the tell and walk right into a strike, presenting an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: The Tell
effect.description: You spot a twitch, a micro-expression, a tell. Reveal the target's current Vitality or one active condition. Gain [Optimized] on your next Defense roll against them.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Predictive Defense
effect.description: You read the shot before it comes. Gain [Optimized] on all Defense rolls against the target until your next turn.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Pattern Recognition
effect.description: You have solved their style. The target gains [Exposed to your attacks] and you ignore their [Guarded] or [Cover] rating for your next attack against them.

gambits.name: Reading the Hand
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You predict their dirty trick. The target cannot use Triggers or Gambits until the start of your next turn.

gambits.name: Instant Reflex
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You act on pure intuition. If the target attacks you before your next turn, you may spend a Trigger to resolve your next Action before they resolve theirs.

name: Rally
risk: Your words ring hollow in the chaos. You present an Opening as your focus shifts to your allies.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Eyes Up!
effect.description: Your words cut through the fog. Clear [Distracted] from one ally in your Zone or an adjacent Zone.

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Move It!
effect.description: You get them moving with purpose. One ally may immediately move 1 Zone without triggering an Opening.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: On My Mark!
effect.description: Your conviction lifts them. One ally gains [Optimized] for their next Primary Action, OR one ally clears one active Perceptual condition ([Distracted], [Dazed], or [Stunned]) through sheer force of will.

gambits.name: Lead the Charge
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You lead by example. If you succeed on your next Primary Action this turn, all allies in your Zone gain [Optimized] on their next rolls.

gambits.name: Commander's Intent
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Your presence galvanizes the group. Grant every ally in your Zone a free Move or Maneuver.

name: Telekinesis
risk: The kinetic feedback surges back through you — you present an Opening.

effect.label: Fleeting
effect.name: Force Nudge
effect.description: A subtle kinetic shove — you displace a weapon, knock something into a target's path, or shift their footing. The target is [Distracted].

effect.label: Basic
effect.name: Force Push / Pull
effect.description: A focused kinetic burst. Move the target OR a sizeable object 1 Zone in any direction. An unwilling target may be pushed into a hazard, into another Zone, or out of Engagement — GM adjudicates narrative effects.

effect.label: Superior
effect.name: Force Slam
effect.description: Kinetic violence. Move the target 1 Zone and knock them [Prone]. If the target is moved into a wall, structure, or hazard, the GM may apply additional effects.

gambits.name: Force Grip
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. You maintain a sustained telekinetic hold. The target is [Restrained] until they succeed on an opposed Physique check — they may attempt once per turn as a Maneuver.

gambits.name: Force Wave
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. The kinetic burst radiates outward. Apply this Maneuver's resolved effect to all enemies in the Zone instead of a single target.
